description.unified: Dispels harmful effects from the ally with the lowest current HP and restores HP 3times, and when healing the target, nearby allies are additionally healed for 40% of the healing amount.
Grants all allies a shield that absorbs damage for [16 sec->4sec]. While the shield is active, Healing Power is increased by [11%->120%] and Status Resistance is increased by [100->800].
Every 20sec, restores [1.5% of Max HP 10 times->14% of Max HP] to the 2 allies with the lowest current HP, and increases their Magic DEF by 60*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) for 15sec.
[Heaven’s Vengeance] [(added) increases the target’s M.DMG taken by 20% for 10 sec and] [(removed) changes the attack target to a random target and] extends Blind duration by {0} sec.
Every 8 sec, heals the 4 allies with the lowest current HP by {0}% of ATK, and increases the Critical Rate of the 4 allies with the highest ATK by [160->200], and Critical DMG by {1}% for 8 sec.
